detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting detecting
